title: Longest Binary Subsequence Less Than or Equal to K
titleCn: 小于等于 K 的最长二进制子序列

testcases.input: s = "1001010", k = 5 Output: 5 Explanation: The longest subsequence of s that makes up a binary number less than or equal to 5 is "00010", as this number is equal to 2 in decimal. Note that "00100" and "00101" are also possible, which are equal to 4 and 5 in decimal, respectively. The length of this subsequence is 5, so 5 is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: 5 Explanation: The longest subsequence of s that makes up a binary number less than or equal to 5 is "00010", as this number is equal to 2 in decimal. Note that "00100" and "00101" are also possible, which are equal to 4 and 5 in decimal, respectively. The length of this subsequence is 5, so 5 is returned.

testcases.input: s = "00101001", k = 1 Output: 6 Explanation: "000001" is the longest subsequence of s that makes up a binary number less than or equal to 1, as this number is equal to 1 in decimal. The length of this subsequence is 6, so 6 is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: "000001" is the longest subsequence of s that makes up a binary number less than or equal to 1, as this number is equal to 1 in decimal. The length of this subsequence is 6, so 6 is returned.
